chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Bail Application No. S- 45 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of bail application. 12.02.2024. Mr. Rabdino Makwal Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing at some length, in view of the fact that two witnesses have already been examined and examination-in-chief of remaining two witnesses has been recorded, does not press this criminal bail application and seeks directions for early conclusion of the trial. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has no objection to the above proposal. Accordingly this criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within two months without fail and submit compliance report. After which in any case the applicant would be at liberty to move fresh bail application before the trial Court for its decision on merit, independent of the impugned order. J U D G E Irfan/PA
